# pakietR

sorting algorithms

# installation

To install the package execute the make command with pakietR as the
working directory.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`insertion_sort()`](https://gdrobot.github.io/pakietR/reference/insertion_sort.md)
  : InsertionSort
- [`pakietR`](https://gdrobot.github.io/pakietR/reference/pakietR-package.md)
  [`pakietR-package`](https://gdrobot.github.io/pakietR/reference/pakietR-package.md)
  : pakietR: Sorting algorithms
- [`quick_sort()`](https://gdrobot.github.io/pakietR/reference/quick_sort.md)
  : QuickSort
- [`selection_sort()`](https://gdrobot.github.io/pakietR/reference/selection_sort.md)
  : SelectionSort
